creator: amistry@am-productions.biz
text:
On Sunday 24 September 2006 16:54, Boris Samorodov wrote:
> The last version has issues:
> -----
> ====================<phase 7: make package>====================
> ===>  Building package for hplip-1.6.7
> Creating package /tmp/packages/All/hplip-1.6.7.tbz
> Registering depends: py24-qt-3.16 ghostscript-gnu-7.07_15
> qscintilla-1.6 qt-3.3.6_2 cups-base-1.2.2 libXft-2.1.7_1
> gnutls-1.4.4_1 gsfonts-8.11_2 libmng-1.0.9 lcms-1.15,1 nas-1.8
> xorg-libraries-6.9.0 libgcrypt-1.2.3_1 libgpg-error-1.4
> sane-backends-1.0.17_3 tiff-3.8.2 libusb-0.1.12_1
> fontconfig-2.3.2_5,1 net-snmp-5.2.3_3 perl-5.8.8 freetype2-2.1.10_5
> png-1.2.12_1 gettext-0.14.5_2 py24-sip-4.4.5 python-2.4.3
> pkg-config-0.21 expat-2.0.0_1 libiconv-1.9.2_2 jpeg-6b_4
> libdrm-2.0.2. Creating bzip'd tar ball in
> '/tmp/packages/All/hplip-1.6.7.tbz' Deleting hplip-1.6.7
> User "hplip" doesn't exist!
> ================================================================
>
> === Checking filesystem state
> list of extra files and directories in / (not present before this
> port was installed but present after it was deinstalled) 9966715   
>     4 drwxr-xr-x    2 root             wheel                 512
> Sep 24 20:50 usr/local/etc/hp 9966718        4 -r--r--r--    1 root
>             wheel                 207 Sep 24 20:50
> usr/local/etc/hp/hplip.conf 9797634        4 drwxr-xr-x    2 root  
>           wheel                 512 Sep 24 20:50
> usr/local/share/applications 9797635        0 lrwxr-xr-x    1 root 
>            wheel                  41 Sep 24 20:50
> usr/local/share/applications/hplip.desktop ->
> /usr/local/share/hplip/data/hplip.desktop 9797636        4
> drwxr-xr-x    3 root             wheel                 512 Sep 24
> 20:50 usr/local/usr 9892388        4 drwxr-xr-x    3 root          
>   wheel                 512 Sep 24 20:50 usr/local/usr/local
> 9892405        4 drwxr-xr-x    3 root             wheel            
>     512 Sep 24 20:50 usr/local/usr/local/etc 9892406        4
> drwxr-xr-x    2 root             wheel                 512 Sep 24
> 20:50 usr/local/usr/local/etc/hp 9892407        4 -r--r--r--    1
> root             wheel                 309 Sep 24 20:50
> usr/local/usr/local/etc/hp/hplip.conf -----
Ok, I've updated it, it should be fine now.

http://am-productions.biz/docs/hplip-1.6.7.tgz
